reports.incident_description: Large crowd surged at OPD entrance when tokens opened; please deploy security to manage queue, verify NICs, and keep doors clear.
Light rain brought water into the main foyer; visitors were slipping; need security to cordon area and redirect foot traffic.
Parent reports phone missing from waiting area; request security to review CCTV near Play Corner and check exit logs.
Two touts by Main Gate directing OPD patients to private labs; please remove and document with gate book.
Relative refused to leave after visiting hours and became loud; require security to de-escalate and clear the bay.
Unknown male with backpack accessed CSSD corridor without pass; need security to intercept and verify ID, and secure the door.
Short rain caused crowd to shelter at ambulance bay, blocking arrival path; request immediate security clearing and traffic control.
Visitor filming through NICU viewing window despite signage; security required to stop recording and check visitor pass.
Request after-hours security escort to quarters; stray dogs and loiterers near Back Gate 2 tonight.
Unattended parcel found under clinic staircase; please activate security protocol, isolate area, and screen with CCTV review.
Queue dispute escalated during rain; two parties pushing at OPD pharmacy shutter; security needed for crowd control.
Man in civilian clothes tried moving an oxygen cylinder from corridor claiming 'urgent use'; security to stop removal and verify authorisation.
Patient became verbally aggressive and threatened staff over token issue; require security presence to de-escalate.
Light rain tracked into lobby making floor slick; need security to place cones, manage entry flow, and prevent falls.
Three-wheelers (tuk-tuks) parked under canopy to avoid rain are blocking emergency ingress; immediate security clearance required.
Audit shows missing tramadol vials from controlled cupboard; please seal area, check access logbook, and review CCTV.
Infant tag alarm triggered (Code Pink) at SCBU entry; require full security response to lock exits and verify all bracelets; likely strap dislodgement.
Post-duty escort requested to staff car park; group of youths loitering near Gate 3.
Wind swung main gate barrier arm and struck a staff car mirror; need security to control gate, record details, and guide traffic.
Token confusion among walk-in donors turned into verbal clash; security requested to mediate and maintain order.
Visitor tailgated through access-controlled ICU door during shift change; security to identify via CCTV and enforce pass checks.
Unlicensed vendor selling herbal oils in OPD queue; please remove and note in occurrence book.
Afternoon rain drew crowd to rear corridor by theatres; passage getting wet and slippery; security needed to cordon and redirect.
Attempted handbag snatch reported near canteen seating; suspect ran toward Rear Gate 1; alert security posts and review cameras.
Intoxicated individual found loitering near mortuary after hours; request immediate security removal and ID check.
Unauthorized vendor entered via Service Gate 2 with a cool box, claiming to supply staff. Please dispatch Security to remove and record details; check CCTV for entry time.
Brief rain led to crowding at OPD sliding doors; turnstile jammed and people tried to push through. Need immediate Security crowd control and temporary barriers.
Heated argument between two patient relatives outside X-ray room; shouting and shoving observed. Request Security to de-escalate and separate parties.
Patient’s mobile phone reported missing during visiting hours. Please review corridor CCTV and assist with visitor exit checks as per theft protocol.
Humidity causing fogged CCTV dome at rear pharmacy store; back door found slightly ajar. Need urgent Security patrol and sealing of the entry.
Light rain pushed crowds under OPD canopy; several three-wheelers parked in the ambulance bay. Security required to clear access for incoming cases.
Intoxicated visitor arguing with nursing staff in Surgical corridor; strong smell of alcohol and refusal to leave. Request Security to escort out and document.
Children from visitors running between ambulances in Car Park B; near-miss reported. Need Security to control access and advise guardians.
Attempted tailgating at NICU staff entrance by unidentified male; badge mismatch triggered alarm. Initiated Code Pink pre-alert—Security respond immediately.
Relative refusing to leave ICU after visiting hours, arguing with staff and blocking doorway. Security needed to enforce visiting policy and clear the area.
Following a thundershower, the OPD turnstile malfunctioned and multiple visitors attempted tailgating. Request Security to manage entry and manual ticket checks.
Agitated father shouting at triage desk; afternoon heat and queue delays worsening behavior. Please send Security to de-escalate and relocate him outside.
Request after-hours Security escort for two staff to Quarters Car Park; pathway lights near Maternity Block are off.
Unknown person loitering near the oxygen manifold enclosure claiming to be a contractor but without ID. Need immediate Security verification and removal.
Two youths seen climbing the fence by the mortuary side gate, a known CCTV blind spot. Request Security patrol and perimeter check.
IV pump battery missing from corridor charging rack outside HDU. Please lock down exits for checks and pull relevant camera footage.
Morning shower left lobby entrance mats saturated; one visitor slipped. Security to cordon area, post wet-floor signage, and assist until housekeeping arrives.
Group of youths on motorbikes harassing staff at Back Gate 3 during shift change. Request Security presence and escorts to bus stop.
Suspected pilferage: minor staff seen tucking ceftriaxone vials into pocket in OPD dressing room. Security to intervene and follow property-theft protocol.
Private car parked in the OT fire lane; driver refuses to move despite instruction. Security assistance required to clear the lane immediately.
Fire exit alarm near Paeds keeps triggering; door propped open by visitors and coastal breeze. Security rounds needed to secure and warn offenders.
Gusty shower toppled temporary hoarding at MRI renovation, creating an unsecured access path. Require Security to barricade and control entry until repairs.
Multiple wallets reported missing in evening clinic queue; suspected pickpocket team. Request urgent CCTV review and plain-clothes Security near counters.
Pharmacy night delivery boy attempted to exit Gate 1 with an unverified carton. Security to perform package check and log identity.
Relative threatened to hit staff after being told outside food not allowed in HDU. Security required for immediate de-escalation and access restriction.
Unauthorized food vendor set up cart by Main Out Gate, drawing patient crowd and blocking ambulance path. Request Security to remove, document NIC if possible, and monitor gate for re-entry.
Afternoon thunderstorm drove a large crowd into OPD foyer; exits partially blocked and tempers flared. Need Security to marshal crowd, keep fire egress clear, and control entry screening.

CCTV feeds for Maternity corridor intermittently dropped during lightning; possible surge. Please dispatch Security to physically patrol corridor and coordinate access control until cameras are stable.
Male attendant attempted to wheel out portable oxygen cylinder towards tuk-tuk during evening rain. Security needed to intercept, verify handover note, and log attempted removal.
Extended family exceeding visiting hours refused to leave Paediatric Ward 2; father shouting at nurses. Request Security to de-escalate and enforce visiting time limits.
During sudden downpour, a motorbike parked under Ambulance Bay canopy, obstructing offload zone. Need Security to clear vehicle and keep access lane free.
Patient reported wallet missing from pharmacy queue after rain crowding. Request Security to review CCTV around counters 3–5 and identify suspected pickpocket.
After-hours escort requested from ETU to Doctors’ Quarters; group of men loitering near quarters fence, whistling. Please send two guards and clear the area.
Code Pink triggered at SCBU when infant tag alarmed during thunder and power dip. Require Security to lock down exits, check CCTV at lifts, and verify matching BHT bands.
Intoxicated visitor demanding entry to resus bay became aggressive with staff. Security intervention required for de-escalation and removal from ETU entrance.
Fresh tool marks on generator yard padlock; a coil of copper cable missing. Request Security to review last night’s CCTV and increase patrols by Boiler House.
Request Security escort for transfer of controlled drug box from Theatre to ICU; corridor crowded with bystanders after visiting hours.
Heavy rain leak near MRI control room; public entering to avoid wet corridor. Need Security to cordon area, restrict entry, and guide patients via alternate route.
Rear exit alarmed after brief power dip; relative attempted tailgating through crash door. Security needed to verify identity and reset alarm.
Individual livestreaming patients in OPD without consent; refused to stop when advised. Request Security to halt recording, obtain NIC, and accompany to Admin for note.
Gusty storm blew Staff Gate ajar; outside vendors entered car park selling bottles. Security required to remove trespassers and secure latch.
Relative produced a pocket knife during dispute over visiting; Code Silver activated. Need immediate Security response to disarm, isolate, and coordinate with police.
Repeated after-hours attempts at rear pharmacy door—three failed card swipes and handle rattling on CCTV. Request overnight footage review and additional patrols.
During a rain burst, scooter skidded near OPD porch; driver argued with bystanders, blocking triage access. Security needed to separate parties and clear entrance.
Condensation on CCTV dome at Maternity entrance obscuring view in humid evening. Please clean lens, adjust angle, and post a guard until visibility is restored.
Queue jumping at Cash Counter in midday heat escalated to verbal abuse of staff. Security support requested to manage line and caution offenders.
Unknown male tailgated through ICU staff door using borrowed lanyard; ran towards waiting area when challenged. Require Security to detain and verify credentials.
Group of youths loitering outside hostel fence, catcalling residents during lights-off. Request patrol to disperse group and monitor lane behind quarters.
Heavy rain flooded OPD side gate area; unscreened visitors slipping in via overflow path. Security to close gate temporarily, redirect through Main Entrance, and assist with crowd control.
Patient reported mobile phone stolen in Surgical Ward; suspect seen near Stairwell B. Request CCTV trace from Ward 5 to exit and conduct bag checks per SOP.
Two men arguing loudly at OPD registration; one shoved the other. Please attend to de-escalate and keep the line moving.
Pharmacy token queue turned unruly in the afternoon heat; a group tried to push past counters. Need security to control crowd and maintain queue order.
During the thunderstorm, about 40 visitors crowded the main foyer and blocked the sliding doors; one tried to tailgate into a staff-only corridor. Request door post and crowd control.
Gusty winds blew the side service gate ajar; an outside vendor entered the stores corridor. Require security to remove and secure the gate.
Several taxi touts sheltering at the OPD porch were soliciting patients aggressively. Please move them off hospital grounds.
During rain and a brief power dip, a youth attempted to snatch a handbag near the dispensary queue; suspect fled towards the car park. Check CCTV and intercept.
Man filming children on the paediatric corridor without permission; refused to stop. Please intervene and escort him out.
Visitors took shelter in the ambulance bay during the downpour and are obstructing an incoming ambulance. Require clearing and temporary barriers.
Unknown male attempted to enter ICU after visiting hours claiming to be a patient's cousin and argued with staff. Request removal and badge check at ICU door.
Lightning set off a fire/panic alarm in Block B; partial evacuation began. Need security to manage stairwells and block lift use until cleared by engineering.
Motorbike parked across the ETU ambulance approach, rider missing. Please locate owner via PA and clear access immediately.
Relatives at the mortuary disputing viewing time became heated; one person threatened staff. Require security presence to calm and enforce schedule.
Relative refused a visitor badge and tried to enter via the back door. Needs to be stopped and redirected to issue a pass.
Short rain led to crowding at the side gate; two individuals tailgated through the biometric door without IDs. Request identity verification and access control.
Wet floors near cashier after afternoon rain caused a slip; crowd pressing forward. Need security to cordon area and manage a single-file queue.
CCTV observed a male lifting a mobile phone from OPD seating; suspect in blue shirt moved towards the canteen. Request interception and recovery.
Post-theatre, a junior nurse requested escort from OT to nurses' quarters due to men loitering near the corridor. Please provide an escort.
Code Pink alarm triggered at the NICU exit when a tag approached the doorway. Need immediate security sweep and door lockdown; likely false but confirm.
Unlicensed snack seller arguing with canteen staff at the back gate and refusing to leave. Please remove and record details.
During heavy rain, car park lanes flooded and two drivers began shouting over a blocked exit. Need traffic control and de-escalation.
External contractor was moving scrap metal towards the rear gate without a gate pass; possible theft. Detain and verify with Stores.
Brief power outage left lifts stalled; crowd built up at stairwells and some tried to force lift doors. Require security to hold the crowd and keep routes clear.
Strong gusts loosened a fence panel near the oxygen plant; people gathering to look. Need immediate cordon and watch until maintenance arrives.
Figure seen on the maternity balcony after visiting hours; CCTV confirms a trespasser. Request patrol to intercept and check intent.
Intoxicated attendant at ETU yelling at the MO after triage decision; refusing to leave and upsetting other patients. Need de-escalation and removal.
During the afternoon downpour, street vendors rushed into the OPD foyer and blocked triage. Please clear non-patients and enforce the no-vendor policy at the main entrance.
Patient reported a wallet theft in the pharmacy queue. Suspect seen on CCTV lingering near token counter; request interception at the south gate and footage preservation.
Torrential rain flooded the car park; the side access door to Block C was propped open with a wedge. Access control compromised—please secure and post a guard.
Male patient attempted to abscond from Ward 8, became verbally aggressive when stopped by staff. Need de-escalation support and safe return to ward.
Request after-hours escort from ETU to staff quarters following late handover. Area around quarters was quiet but poorly lit.
During the thunderstorm, three riders pushed motorcycles into the OPD corridor to avoid rain, creating fumes and slip risk. Please remove bikes and secure side shutters.
Stray dog entered the paediatric waiting area as doors were kept open during squally winds. Children distressed—request animal removal and entrance monitoring.
Visitor attempted to pocket a patient’s mobile phone. Suspect left ward; please review CCTV and stop-check at main gate.
Controlled-drug crate was left briefly in corridor due to rain. Unknown male loitering nearby—request immediate securing of crate and ID check.
Attendants sleeping on stair landing blocked the fire exit. Repeated notices ignored—need Security to clear and enforce access.
Aggressive relative refused to leave ICU after visiting hours and shouted at staff. Request de-escalation and escort out.
Gusty winds jammed the main gate boom barrier in the open position. Vehicles entering without log—need manual control and guard at gate.
Male individual filmed patients despite signage. He refused to delete footage; please intervene, escort out, and document incident.
Heavy rain caused crowding at token counter; queue jump led to a brief scuffle. Need Security to manage queue and keep corridor clear.
Unlicensed vendor selling herbal balms inside ANC corridor despite warnings. Please remove and keep vendors beyond the main gate.
During the evening rain and thunder, unknown person seen near General Stores roller door; pry marks noted. Request perimeter sweep and access control.
Request escort from Theatre to staff quarters after late list. Prior reports of teasing near the walkway last night.
Code Pink alarm: NICU exit held open with a stool during storm; alarm triggered. Need immediate lockdown of stairs/lifts and infant tag verification support.
Two youths used the pathology corridor as a shortcut from the bus stand. Please redirect and monitor the side gate.
Wind-blown rain pooled near the ETU lift lobby; several near-slips. Request Security to cordon area and redirect foot traffic until mopped.
Dispute between two families over beds escalated; one man shouting and refusing to step out. Need de-escalation and removal of extra attendants.
Strong SW wind shifted Camera 14, creating a blind spot over Orthopaedic Stores roller door. Request immediate guard post until realigned.
Oxygen regulator missing from trolley; found at gate during bag check of an attendant. Please retain suspect details and preserve CCTV for police.
Unattended parcel left near the OPD pharmacy window; area cordoned as per protocol. Item later identified as a lunch box; request closure and CCTV review.
Basement partially flooded after intense downpour; two outsiders attempted to access parked cars claiming to ‘check’ them. Please verify IDs and restrict to owners only; patrol the area.
Wind-driven rain pooled at the OPD main entrance; slippery crowding started. Please deploy guards to cordon, place wet floor signs, and manage entry queue.
During the sudden rain burst, a man cut the token line and became verbally aggressive at OPD Pharmacy. Need security to de-escalate and enforce queue.
Two street vendors set up by the main gate in the breeze, trying to sell snacks to visitors. Please move them and keep the gate clear.
After the thunderstorm, access control to the OT corridor is malfunctioning; one door stuck open. Need security presence and manual checks until reset.
Guardian refusing to leave after visiting hours, arguing with staff in Paediatric Ward. Request security to escort out calmly.
Attendant reported a phone missing from the OPD waiting area. Please review lobby and token-counter CCTV and guide on complaint.
Taxi and a three-wheeler are blocking the ambulance bay to avoid showers. Clear the path immediately.
During the lightning burst, infant RFID tag alarm triggered (Code Pink). Need all exits manned and CCTV sweep of stairwells.
Two suspected intoxicated visitors loitering at the ward entrance, using foul language. Request de-escalation and removal.
Unknown male tailgated into staff quarters after evening clinics. Kindly check IDs and patrol the perimeter.
Strong winds forced the boom gate to remain open; vehicles entering unchecked. Need guard to control manually until repair.
Suspected pilferage of IV cannulas and syringes from the procedure room. Request CCTV review and sealing of the cupboard.
Request after-hours escort from ETU to quarters; loiterers and stray dogs near the back path.
Visitor found smoking near the oxygen manifold behind CSSD despite signage. Need immediate intervention.
Morning drizzle caused lobby crowding; pushing at entrance when counters opened. Please deploy barriers and manage flow.
Wind lifted the donor registration tent near the car park; pegs loose. Please cordon the area and assist re-securing.
Rear pharmacy door left propped during delivery; unknown person seen near controlled drugs room. Need immediate security check and footage pull.
Repeated reports of a man harassing nurses near the quarters fence after dusk. Request increased patrols and statement taking.
Brief storm caused water into mortuary ramp; crowd gathered taking photos. Please restrict access and assist safe movement.
Post-downpour, Block B/C CCTV feeds show fogging and outages; stairwell blind spots. Need temporary guards at those points.
Mother reports handbag missing at the vaccination area. Kindly check cameras at the clinic desk and main gate.
Relative tried to force entry to the Fever Isolation Unit during visiting ban. Need security to block and explain protocol.
Small sedan with dark tints circling staff car park repeatedly; previous week had fuel siphoning. Request plate check and patrol.
During the short rain burst, plant room area crowded; roof access ladder found unlocked. Please secure and post 'No Entry'.
Suspected pickpocket group at the OPD entrance; attendants detained one. Need security custody and inform police per protocol.
Visitor refusing to wear issued badge attempted to push into ICU citing 'emergency'. Please intercept at ICU foyer and enforce access control.
During light rain, crowded under OPD awning, a visitor reported mobile phone missing. Need CCTV review and assistance to identify suspect loitering near token counter.
Code Pink alarm sounded at corridor exit during heavy rain and thunder. Request immediate lockdown of exits and sweep of stairwells.
Intern doctor requests escort from Medical Ward to quarters. Unknown male seen loitering near the dark walkway by the mortuary.
Two-wheeler rider arguing and blocking the ambulance route near Gate 2 due to rain parking. Requires de-escalation and removal from lane.
OPD lobby floor wet; crowd pressing in for files. Please place barricades and manage queue to prevent slips and disorder.
Controlled drug cupboard keys not returned after ward round. Need immediate security presence at Pharmacy and CCTV check on corridor.
Thunderstorm caused intermittent CCTV outages in Old Surgical Block. Request security patrols to cover blind spots until feeds stabilize.
Aggressive relative refusing to leave after visiting hours, shouting at staff in Paediatric Ward. Need de-escalation and removal.
Street vendor at Gate 1 touting 'fast OPD tokens' to patients. Kindly move the individual away and prevent solicitation.
Delivery person tailgated into sterile OT corridor without pass. Please verify ID, escort out, and secure the access door.
Attempted two-wheeler theft near Rear Gate during evening rain; suspect ran toward staff quarters. Need area sweep and CCTV review.
Request secure escort to transfer OPD cash to Accounts safe after hours. Few unknown persons lingering near Block B stairs.
Rain pushed crowd under OPD canopy; queue jumping led to a scuffle. Need crowd control and separation at token queue.
Suspicious male seen on CCTV at NICU back stairwell after hours. Please respond urgently and secure neonatal area doors.
Courier attempted to remove used drug cartons without gate pass near Stores. Possible diversion attempt; intervene and verify.
Steady rain caused pooling at Main Entrance; slips reported. Request security to cordon slippery area and manage single-file entry.
Former employee at HR counter shouting and threatening to 'bring trouble'. Please remove from premises and document incident.
Intoxicated attendant in ETU yelling and attempting to hit minor staff during rainy evening rush. Immediate restraint/de-escalation needed.
Repeated tailgating into Records room; unauthorized persons near file racks. Request door monitoring and ID checks.
Taxi sheltering from gusty rain is blocking ambulance bay at Gate 2 despite instructions. Need vehicle moved immediately.
Night staff request escort from ward to nurses’ hostel. Dogs and poorly lit path behind Laundry causing concern.
Patient’s bag reported stolen from OPD washroom; suspect last seen heading toward canteen. Need CCTV check and area sweep.
During heavy rain, multiple non-visitors sheltering inside Maternity entrance; refusing to leave. Please enforce visiting policy and verify IDs.
Two youths at Gate 3 offering 'fast-track' clinic tokens for a fee. Request removal and liaison with local police post if they persist.
Unknown food vendor entered via rear service gate and refused to sign the visitor log. Please send security to remove him and record NIC.
Relatives refusing to leave after visiting hours; corridor crowded after earlier rain. Need security to clear the area and de-escalate.
Patient reported phone missing from OPD benches. Request CCTV review and brief exit check at Gates 1 and 2.
Two-wheeler parked in ambulance bay; rider arguing with staff. Need security to move the bike and warn the owner.
Heavy rain pushed a crowd into the OPD foyer; people slipping and pushing. Please deploy guards for queue control and place cones.
Infant tag alarm activated during thunderstorm. Request Code Pink response: lock lifts/exits and verify via CCTV immediately.
Kindly provide escort to quarters across back car park; stray dogs seen and lighting is poor.
Attendant became aggressive over bed allocation. Need security to calm and remove him from the ward corridor.
Suspicious male loitering near pharmacy back door during stock take; seen on CCTV earlier. Request patrol to check ID and stand by.
After thunder, token system stalled and crowd surged at triage. Need security for line management and entry restriction.
Oxygen cage padlock appears partly sawn; possible attempted theft overnight. Please secure the area and review CCTV.
Handbag snatched in paediatric waiting area; suspect ran towards Gate 2. Request immediate gate block and CCTV tracking.
Two nurses finishing late list request escort to quarters; men loitering near pathway behind theatre.
Gusty rain triggered the side-door alarm; patients sheltering inside the corridor. Need security to close door and redirect flow.
Intoxicated relative shouting and banging at ETU doors after casualty arrival. Request immediate de-escalation and removal.
Gate 3 camera fogged and feed dropped due to condensation. Please post a guard and maintain manual entry log.
Two motorbikes tried to shortcut through the ambulance gate without permits. Need guards to block and redirect to main entrance.
Visitor filming on phone in ICU corridor despite signage. Request security to stop and enforce no-photography policy.
Front steps flooded during thundery rain; slip risk noted. Need barricades and crowd control until cleared.
Brief power blink left controlled drug register open; outsider peered through hatch. Request security to secure hatch and remain on post.
Private lab agent arguing and trying to jump the queue at cash counter. Please send security to maintain order.
After thunder, lift stalled at Level 2 and a crowd gathered. Need security to cordon area and keep access clear for repair.
Male tried to enter verandah via external stairs claiming to be relative, no NIC produced. Request security to detain and inform police.
Delivery truck without gate pass attempted early entry at Stores gate. Please refuse entry and record details.
Drone hovering outside paediatric ward windows after rain eased. Request security to track via CCTV and coordinate with police.
Crowd bunched at OPD main entrance during light rain; one visitor tried to force entry to Surgical Ward outside visiting hours. Request Security to control queue and enforce access.
Side door to Imaging was propped open for ventilation in the heat; unknown male slipped into the corridor. Need Security sweep and door secured.
Rain pushed visitors to shelter at the rear staff gate causing tailgating at access control. Please deploy Security to manage entry and clear the area.
Aggressive father shouting at paediatric OPD counter, refusing to queue. Security needed for de-escalation and to protect staff.
Gusty wind blew open the delivery gate by pharmacy store; CCTV shows unknown person near oxygen manifold cage. Security to attend immediately.
Rainwater tracked into main lobby created slip hazard; crowd congesting near entrance. Request Security cordon and crowd control.
Infant-tag alarm triggered during thunderstorm power dip; initiating Code Pink. Require Security to lock down exits and review CCTV.
Power fluctuation released OT complex maglocks; two vendors wandered into sterile corridor. Security needed to clear and secure doors.
Drivers sheltering from intermittent rain blocked part of the ambulance bay. Security required to clear and keep the lane open.
Intoxicated visitor refusing to leave at end of visiting hours, using foul language toward staff. Need Security escort out.
Visitor reported handbag stolen from OPD seating; suspect seen on CCTV moving toward canteen. Request Security response and camera review.
During heavy rain, public used staff-only back stairwell to shelter, breaching restricted access. Please post a Security guard and redirect flow.
Two persons loitering near motorcycles in dim car park during downpour; appeared to tamper with number plates. Request immediate Security patrol.
Wind kept slamming the side access door; an unknown man tailgated a porter into the unit. Security to verify ID and escort out.
Queue disorder at OPD cash counter as people rushed in from rain; minor scuffle started. Security assistance for queuing and separation.
Thundery weather caused CCTV outage in Maternity block. Request Security to initiate manual patrols until feeds restore.
Family tried to push past staff into ICU citing emergency during storm. Need Security to enforce ICU access protocol immediately.
Requesting after-hours Security escort to staff quarters; recent stray dogs and poor lighting along the path.
Thunderstorm crowd banged on satellite pharmacy shutter; one person reached into dispensing area. Security needed for barrier and order.
Attempted removal of two IV pumps from corridor trolley near CSSD; suspect in raincoat seen walking away. Security to respond and review cameras.
Flooded section of visitor car park led to a stuck car and heated argument with attendant. Request Security to manage crowd and coordinate tow.
Large group gathered at mortuary entrance after hours demanding release. Security required to control gate and enforce policy.
Controlled drug cupboard key unaccounted for in OT recovery; potential pilferage risk. Security to initiate lock-down and chain-of-custody review.
Rain shelters overflowed; footpath vendors moved into hospital perimeter. Request Security to remove encroachment and keep entrances clear.
Drone sighted over paediatric ward courtyard; privacy and safety concern. Security to locate operator and coordinate with authorities.
Sudden downpour drove a large crowd into the OPD foyer; visitors pushed past the desk to avoid rain. Request security to control entry and enforce visiting-hour limits.
Lightning caused an access-control reboot at NICU; mag-lock cycled and door remained ajar. Need security to post a guard and check CCTV of the corridor.
During the heavy shower, three tuk-tuks blocked the ambulance bay while sheltering. Request immediate security to clear bay and manage the gate.
Relative under influence became aggressive, refusing to leave after hours. Security support needed for de-escalation and removal.
Code Pink alarm activated during storm-related power dip; infant tag pinged near lift lobby. Lock down exits and verify movement on CCTV.
In the crowded, wet lobby a man attempted to snatch a visitor’s purse and ran toward the south exit. Need security pursuit and camera review.
Unauthorized umbrella vendors slipped in via the side gate during rain. Please remove them and secure the gate.
Lightning caused a brief CCTV outage on Block B east wing. Request security foot patrols to cover blind spots until feed stabilizes.
During a power flicker, a visitor reached over the counter toward a Tramadol carton. Security needed to intervene and secure the storeroom door.
Private car parked across the ambulance ramp; driver refusing to move despite rain. Request security to clear the obstruction immediately.
Group of six relatives insisting on staying by the bedside due to bad weather. Need security to enforce visiting policy and escort them to the waiting area.
Unknown male attempted entry claiming to be a cousin; name not on the list. Please verify at the desk and remove from ward corridor.
Phone snatching attempt near ticket counter during storm-related crowding. Security response needed and footage retrieval from Camera OPD-03.
Infant tag briefly lost signal near rear stairwell; request immediate corridor lockdown and exit checks per protocol.
Relative shouted at cashier over refund and hit the counter. Security needed for de-escalation and to clear the queue.
After gusty winds, the access card reader at OT-2 failed; staff entering without proper logging. Post a guard and start manual sign-in.
Patient’s handbag reported missing from waiting corridor. Need security to review corridor cameras and check exits immediately.
During the squall, two family groups argued and shoved each other in the main foyer. Security intervention required to separate and move them out.
Request after-hours escort to staff quarters; pathway lights unreliable after the storm.
Staff noticed a small drone hovering above maternity roof after visiting hours. Please dispatch security to investigate and notify police if needed.
Brief flooding diverted public through the staff gate near CSSD. Need security to redirect and secure the gate.
Intoxicated visitor threatened staff and refused to leave the ETU. Urgent security needed for restraint and handover to police.
Portable ultrasound probe missing after evening list. Request security to lock store exits, check loading bay, and pull corridor footage.
OPD cash transfer to Accounts requires security escort due to unusually heavy footfall in the corridor.
Power surge during thunder triggered the store door tamper alarm; unknown person loitering near loading bay. Request immediate security sweep.
During the downpour, a crowd rushed into OPD lobby, blocking the entrance and arguing over tokens; need security to manage crowd flow and cordon the slippery area.
Non-custodial father refused to leave after visiting hours, shouting at staff and filming; request de-escalation and removal as children were distressed.
Humidity fogged the NICU corridor dome camera; we need security to post a guard and monitor access until CCTV visibility is restored.
Two helmets reported missing from the motorcycle shed near Gate 2; please review CCTV and increase patrols as evening rain brought many outsiders under the shelter.
Ambulance bay congested with unauthorized taxis seeking shelter from steady rain; request immediate clearance and traffic control to keep emergency access open.
Families bedding down in main lobby citing rain; please enforce closing time and move them to designated waiting area without incident.
Attendant tried recording a minor procedure on mobile despite warnings; he argued with staff and refused to step out. Need security to intervene.
Umbrella rack theft near OPD pharmacy suspected; one man loitering, then missing umbrellas after squally shower. Request CCTV review and patrol.
Code Pink alarm from maternity stairwell; infant tag triggered near Exit C. Initiate exit control and CCTV check until baby-location confirmed by ward.
Side gate wedged open with a brick; wet shortcut used by unknown vendors entering to canteen. Need gate secured and IDs checked.
Aggressive relative demanded priority at ETU, pushing chairs and abusing staff; require immediate de-escalation and removal if noncompliant.
Heavy rain drove a surge into OPD foyer; queues collapsed and exit doors blocked. Please control entry and re-establish token lines.
Two midazolam vials unaccounted from Theatre drug trolley after evening list; request security seal check, access log, and corridor CCTV review.
Large visitor group continued prayers after 8 pm, disturbing patients and refusing to leave. Need security to enforce visiting hours gently.
Unidentified male tailgated into NICU at shift change without a badge; verbally rude when challenged. Please verify ID and escort out.
Rainwater pooled in front car park; vehicles blocking ambulance lane during patient pickups. Request traffic marshaling and cones.
After-hours escort requested to staff quarters; stray dogs seen near back path and lights flickering in drizzle.
CCTV for our corridor intermittently blanks during rain—possible condensation on dome. Please increase patrols and monitor access to side stair.
Group of youths sheltering near boundary wall, drinking and peering through fence into maternity. Need removal and patrol of perimeter.
Patient’s mobile missing after visiting hours; last seen on bedside locker. Request exit bag checks as per policy and corridor CCTV review.
Man claiming to be pharma rep attempted entry to controlled store without appointment or ID; please verify credentials and escort out.
Rain caused long vehicle queue at Main Gate; impatient driver honking and nearly struck pedestrian. Need immediate traffic control.
External food vendor tried to push trolley into ICU corridor despite access rules; refused verbal instruction. Please stop and document.
Male relative loitering outside female staff change room; claims he is waiting for wife but area is staff-only. Kindly verify and move him.
Request night escort to car park; two men seen loitering by boundary after kiosk closed, lights dim on that stretch.
Relative became loud and threatening at OPD triage during rain delays; request Security to de-escalate and escort out.
Thunderstorm drove visitors into main foyer, blocking the entrance and a fire exit. Need Security to manage crowd flow and keep access clear.
Visitor reported handbag missing at canteen. Request CCTV review of canteen corridor and exit gates.
Unknown male attempted ICU entry after visiting hours, insisting to see a patient. Security needed to verify ID and remove.
Evening rain made OPD ramp slippery; several near-falls at entrance. Please cordon and redirect foot traffic until mopped.
Suspected attempt to remove a staff motorcycle from back parking; plate partly covered. Need CCTV pull and gate hold.
Request Security escort for two female interns to quarters; path behind dialysis unit poorly lit tonight.
Infant tag alarm triggered (Code Pink) in postnatal ward; humidity may have affected sensor. Immediate exit checks and sweep needed.
Two OPD-facing CCTV domes fogged after showers; request increased Security rounds and manual entrance monitoring until cleared.
Visitor attempted to bring an arrack bottle to Surgical Ward. Please search and deny entry as per policy.
Patient became verbally aggressive at pharmacy window, pounding shutter for sedatives. Security to de-escalate and remove from area.
Tampered padlock found at controlled drug cage during morning check. Request urgent seal, scene protection, and CCTV review (11 PM–5 AM).
Rain pushed excess visitors into lobby; many refusing to leave post visiting time. Need Security to enforce hours and clear lifts.
Attender reports wallet missing in OPD Bay C. Please review cameras and detain suspected pickpocket near ticket counter.
Unregistered gas cylinder vendor at service gate without gate pass. Security to stop entry and verify with Procurement.
Disoriented elderly patient wandered toward rear exit without attender. Please intercept and return to Ward 8.
Ex-casual staff attempted lab access using old ID. Security to confiscate card and log trespass.
Request after-hours Security escort to staff bus stop; group of men loitering outside side gate.
Male loitering near pharmacy loading bay, recording on phone. Security to check purpose and clear restricted area.
Private car parked in ambulance bay blocking inbound transfer. Need immediate Security action to locate driver and clear zone.
Child separated from mother in crowded OPD. Request Security to activate child-locate and monitor all exits.
Pack of stray dogs entered via rear gate toward waste yard. Security to secure gate and patrol till animal control arrives.
Evening humidity and brief rain fogged CCTV at back gate. Please post a guard and log all movements manually.
Medicine trolley missing during shift change between Ward 5 and theatre. Seal exits and review corridor cameras urgently.
New Year crowd gathered at main gate with horns disturbing neonatal unit. Security to move crowd off perimeter and control fireworks.
